description: Open-top rectangular container with rounded vertical corners, 60x40x30mm, shelled with 2mm wall thickness.
notes: Position the container centered at (0,0) on the XY plane, with the bottom at Z=0. The inner cavity must have a depth of 28mm (leaving a 2mm thick bottom floor) and wall thickness of 2mm. Manual subtraction of an inner rounded box (radius 3mm) is recommended for stability over a general shell operation.
